prompts:
warm, premium, local

Hey! I wanted to thank you again for your help, this is very exciting and I can't wait to see what we make!

I guess this is a website I somewhat admire. 
https://desertlens.net/
They are a really big company in PHX.

Most real estate media pages are boring and can be confusing. This site, in my opinion, is pretty boring and somewhat confusing. 

I want it so plain and simple that ANYONE could use it. But still modern and sleek AF

I do like their ordering system. BUT if that's not something you want to mess with I already pay for and use ARYEO. It is a scheduling and media delivery service specifically for Real Estate Media.

When you go to order on the site it has like 4 or 5 bubbles with options and what not. I LOVE that. Full transparency and no hidden costs.

If we can get this site up, then I'll run some ads, and if we get 2 photoshoots a day, we will have won :)

I am a videographer, but I can make faster/easier money with photoshoots.

Lets probably stay away from black? I think a lot of sites these days are going back to white. Nice and clean and easy on the eyes. 

Lets make sure they see my best shots and videos first, then see pricing :) Or whatever idk.

Anyway, I am here for any and all questions. :) Sorry that seems like a lot!

Cant wait!
Colin

Photos, video, logos, headshots.

[Image #2]

use this as hero background image
